purpose: Policy-as-data for Pathfinder (Planner) learning path optimization, prerequisite mapping, and deadline management

structure.edges: Prerequisite relationships (directed: A must precede B)

mastery_sources.caveat: Use to detect practice effects but don't override Prism's estimate
Often overoptimistic; use only for tiebreaking

prerequisite_readiness.action_if_below_minimum: Recommend prerequisite review before starting topic

bottleneck_analysis.definition: A topic that, if mastered, unblocks the most downstream topics or has highest criticality for goal

algorithm.step_1: For each unmastered topic, count downstream topics that depend on it

example.scenario: Student wants to master Power Systems (goal) in 8 weeks
example.recommendation: AC_Fundamentals is the biggest bottleneck; prioritize this first

optimal_path_algorithm.heuristic: Estimated time to goal = sum(mastery_time × (1 − current_mastery)) for unmastered topics
optimal_path_algorithm.cost_function: Total weeks to reach goal given time_per_week budget
constraints: Respect prerequisite ordering (can't learn topic before prerequisites mastered)
Balance depth vs. breadth (don't rush critical topics)
optimal_path_algorithm.output: Optimal sequence of topics + weekly breakdown + milestone dates

week_template.time_budget: Total hours for week, breakdown by session

structure: Warm-up (5–10 min): Review related mastered topic
Learn new (20–30 min): Sage explanation + Scout related notes
Consolidate (5–10 min): Preview next week's topic
Prism feedback (5–10 min): Explain what went well / needs review
Reflection (5–10 min): Prism grading + misconception detection

pace_monitoring.on_track_definition: Completed X% of material by week Y, where X% = (Y / total_weeks) × 100

fallen_one_week_behind.warning: You're about 1 week behind schedule. At current pace, you'll miss deadline.
options: Accelerate: Increase study time or difficulty
Reduce scope: Drop non-critical topics or lower goal mastery to 0.75

fallen_two_weeks_behind.warning: ⚠️ Critical risk: 2 weeks behind. Unlikely to meet deadline at current pace.
fallen_two_weeks_behind.action: Recommend scope reduction OR instructor consultation

ahead_of_schedule.suggestion: You're ahead! Consider: (1) Deepen mastery on current topics to 0.95+, (2) Add stretch topics, (3) Maintain pace for buffer

trigger_conditions: Prism updates mastery estimate by > 0.15 on a bottleneck topic
Student marks topic as mastered earlier/later than predicted
dynamic_path_updates.update_scope: Recompute remaining path; preserve completed topics; adjust weeks N+1 to N+8
dynamic_path_updates.communication: Always explain what changed and why (e.g., 'You mastered Three-Phase faster than predicted; unlocked Transmission starting Week 4')

learning_path_header.pace_status: [On track / At risk / Ahead] with reason

mastery_snapshot.format: Graph or table of current mastery on all relevant topics
mastery_snapshot.highlights: Bottleneck topics, mastered topics, weak spots

bottleneck_summary.format: Ranked list of top-3 blockers (topic + impact score + recommended action)
bottleneck_summary.example: 1. AC Fundamentals (blocker score: 2.99) — Unlock 3 downstream topics; recommend focus Week 1

weekly_schedule.format: Week 1–8 breakdown with topics, agents, milestones, risks

example_week_1.milestone: Reach 0.70 mastery on AC Fundamentals by Friday

risk_assessment.example: Risk: AC Fundamentals weak (0.71). If you don't improve to 0.75 by Week 1, Three-Phase will be hard. Mitigation: Extra Sage session Wed + 2 Forge problems daily.

confidence_score.example: Confidence: 0.78 (good mastery data, but learning rate uncertain)

accelerated_pace.trigger: Recommended hours/week > 80% of student's stated availability
accelerated_pace.gate_message: This path requires [X] hours/week. You said [Y]. Still want to try?
accelerated_pace.action_if_confirmed: Generate path + warn about burnout risk

scope_reduction.trigger: Optimal path infeasible (unreachable deadline or time budget too small)
scope_reduction.gate_message: Your deadline / time budget makes full mastery impossible. Reduce goal to [0.75] or extend deadline by [2 weeks]?

multiple_optimal_paths.trigger: A* finds 3+ paths with equivalent cost
multiple_optimal_paths.gate_message: Multiple equally good paths exist. Prefer: (1) Depth-first (deep mastery, few topics) or (2) Breadth-first (survey many topics)?

student_off_pace.gate_message: You're falling behind. Act now? (Accelerate / Reduce scope / Extend deadline / Get help)

when_no_deadline_given.action: Assume 8-week timeline; ask student: 'When's your deadline? (I'm assuming 8 weeks.)'

when_time_availability_unknown.action: Assume 5 hours/week; ask: 'How much time can you study weekly?'

when_mastery_map_incomplete.action: Use Sage to explain missing prerequisites; compute path with estimates

when_goal_topic_not_in_graph.action: Ask: 'What's your course/exam name?' and 'What topics are on it?' to build custom graph

log_every: Goal topic, deadline, time budget provided
A* search (start state, goal state, path found, cost)
Final path presented with confidence score
